title: National Students Day & 78th Foundation Day of ABVP
summary: 🚩 National Students' Day was celebrated with great enthusiasm by the ABVP Tripura University Unit through ABVP flag hoisting and the distribution of greeting cards, inspiring the spirit of student leadership, service, and nation-building. 🚩 ज्ञान • शील • एकता 🚩
description:
National Students Day was celebrated with great enthusiasm by the ABVP Tripura University Unit at the Tripura University campus. The programme commenced with the ceremonial hoisting of the ABVP flag by Tripura State Secretary Shri Rabi Shankar Haldar Ji, in the esteemed presence of State Janajati Pramukh Shri Rohit Debbarma Ji and State Central University Works Convenor Shri Srideep Majumder Ji.
  
  On this occasion, the ABVP Tripura University Unit also distributed National Students Day greeting cards among students across the campus to commemorate the significance of the day and spread the ideals of student leadership, service, and nation-building. The celebration witnessed enthusiastic participation from students and ABVP karyakartas, reflecting the spirit of unity, responsibility, and dedication towards the nation.
